report.summary: EOD v18 cycle-close (Mar 16): No new commits — git index.lock persists 7+ hours (since 13:06). Working tree drift worsened to 509 files (up from 472 in v17). PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated to jupiter-solana-guide + ondo-finance-rwa-guide. Published pages count now 376. TS errors steady at 42. Rate limiter still 0/6 — 14th consecutive flag. FOMC T-2 risk.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since last cycle — latest remains cb65a9d (Day 42 publish). git index.lock continues to block all commits.
PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated since v17: was story-protocol-ip-guide + aster-chain-guide, now jupiter-solana-guide + ondo-finance-rwa-guide (2 items).
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 376 raw slugs (up from 368 in v17), but ~102 slugs still missing page.tsx (~27%). Concentrated in /learn, /taxes, /wallets, /investing/best, /blog stubs.

TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file, needs rename to .tsx), 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped < and > in JSX). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
Local build crashed with 'Bus error (core dumped)' — likely OOM in sandbox VM. Not indicative of Vercel build health (Vercel has 8GB+ memory).
No new regressions detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60, stale cache fallback. Circuit breaker + retry logic. No rate limiter.
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600. Circuit breaker. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300. Circuit breaker. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + FNG aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled. Circuit breaker. No rate limiter.
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300, full FALLBACK_DATA present. Circuit breaker. No rate limiter.
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama /pools, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL in route), s-maxage=300, 5s timeout. No fallback, returns 500 on error. No rate limiter.
All 6 routes use shared api-helpers.ts with circuit breaker (5 failures, 1min reset) + exponential backoff (3 retries).
PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() still NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes — 14th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-2) may drive traffic spikes to unprotected endpoints.
Upstream APIs (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me) could not be verified from sandbox — egress blocked. Code-level review shows healthy patterns.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Vercel deployment: Last deploy from Day 42 publish (cb65a9d). No new commits — no new deploy triggered this cycle.
Next.js config stable: output standalone, ignoreBuildErrors true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4, workerThreads false.
git index.lock persists since 13:06 today (7+ hours) — blocking ALL commits. Working tree now 509 modified/untracked files (up from 472 in v17, net +37 files this cycle).
Middleware healthy at 127 lines — security headers, robots tags, and cache-control properly configured.
No vercel.json in repo — all config managed via next.config.ts and Vercel dashboard.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing committed or deployed — git index.lock blocking all progress for 7+ hours.

DELTA SINCE v17: Working tree grew by 37 files (472→509). PUBLISH_QUEUE rotated from story-protocol-ip-guide+aster-chain-guide to jupiter-solana-guide+ondo-finance-rwa-guide. Published pages count increased from 368→376 in source file (uncommitted).

CARRY-OVER (priority order): (1) Remove git index.lock to unblock commits — rm .git/index.lock. (2) Commit 509 uncommitted files in staged batches. (3) Apply checkRateLimit to 6 public API routes (14 cycles overdue, FOMC T-2). (4) Rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx to fix 40/42 TS errors. (5) Fix unescaped JSX in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (<$50K and >$25K). (6) Add fallback data to fear-greed, trending, defi-yields routes.

BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock (created 13:06 today) must be removed before ANY work can be committed or deployed. Command: rm .git/index.lock — this is the single biggest bottleneck. 509 files of uncommitted work are at risk.
